details.body:
• Administrator of the Sovereign Base Areas of Akrotiri and Dhekelia and Commander British Forces Cyprus
  • Head of Defence Operational Capability, providing impartial assessments to Ministers and Service Chiefs
  • Commandant of the Royal Air Force College Cranwell, overseeing all initial officer and aviator training, Tedder Academy of Leadership, RAF’s Youth Engagement and STEM Policy, and University Air Squadrons
  • Head of Approvals Division, Military Aviation Authority
  • Commander of the Expeditionary Air Wing during Operation UNIFIED PROTECTOR in Libya
  • Director Defence Studies for the RAF
  • Command of 100 Squadron

person.title: Air Vice-Marshal Peter Squires OBE MA BEng(Hons)

details.body:
Director MAA responsibilities include:

  • Responsible for regulating all Defence aviation activity, with a mission to enhance operational capability through modern, innovative air safety regulations and practices
  • Setting regulations and providing air safety assurance to DG Defence Safety Authority
  • Senior Operating Subject Matter Expert for the Military Aviation Authority across all divisions
  • Leading and directing MAA strategy, delivery and development
  • MOD link with the Civil Aviation Authority (CAA) and European Aviation Safety Agency (EASA) for aviation regulatory matters
  • MOD link with Industry for design, manufacturing, maintenance, modification and certification standards and Contractor Accountable Manager organisations
